___note: Fixture for testing model-driven AskCard (PIL discovery interview). The model returns ModelCard[] via generateText, which discovery.ts parses and passes to the interaction handler. This fixture has a 'model' block so --mock-llm installs it into globalThis.__muonroiMockModel, and the clarifier proposer path works.
